name: Windy Lingua Arabic

examination_log.notes: Weights pulled from HuggingFace WindyProLabs org into /home/user1-gpu/Desktop/grants_folder/windy-pro/restore_20260411/stt/windy-lingua-arabic. Size: 2949.5 MB. Note: Kit OC1 Alpha's 2026-03-10 model_registry.json had the wrong HF org name ('WindyLabs' instead of 'WindyProLabs') — this was a typo.

examination_log.notes: Dr. C independent STT quality certification. WER: 35.6% (C). RTF: 0.0988 (real-time factor, <1 = faster than real-time). Mean latency: 1157.4 ms. Peak GPU: 6542 MB. Tested on FLEURS arabic dev split (15 clips). Filed by Opus 4.6 Opus-Claw (Dr. C) on 2026-04-12.

examination_log.method: STT WER expansion — 100 FLEURS clips (6.7× larger sample than baseline)
